title: FuelCell Energy (FCEL) Earnings Report Dates & History
text: FuelCell Energy earnings calendar and historical results from MarketBeat. Company typically reports earnings within 15-20 days of quarter end. Recent earnings schedule: Q1 2026 reported March 9, 2026; next earnings expected June 5, 2026. Historical earnings dates documented back to 2020. Q4 2024 reported December 19, 2024. Q3 2024 reported September 5, 2024. Q2 2024 reported June 10, 2024. Q1 2024 reported March 7, 2024. Q4 2023 reported December 21, 2023. Earnings have shown pattern of revenue variability driven by large project timing and service agreement execution. EPS consistently negative throughout historical period due to research and development spending, manufacturing ramp costs, and overhead structure. Gross margin trends show improvement when service revenue and generation revenue mix is favorable, but pressured by product sales carrying negative margins. Cash burn metrics improved in recent periods as company achieved positive operating cash flow expectations. Analyst estimate revisions show trend of downward revenue revisions offset by EPS expectation improvements as cost management gains credibility.
